chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1834 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.7895/2023 3. For hearing of main case 27-02-2024 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General Mr. Shaharyar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General a/w ASI/IO Mushtaque Ali o PS Kotdiji.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Respondent No.4/I.O of Crime No.248/2023, registered at P.S, Kotdiji, u/s 365-B, 34 PPC, is present and files copy of statement of alleged abductee Mst. Rukhsar (petitioner No.1) recorded u/s 161 Cr.P.C and states that as per her statement, she being sui juris has contracted marriage with Adil (petitioner No.2) without any pressure, coercion or compulsion, but with her own accord and free will and is leading a happy life with him in a pleasant atmosphere. She further stated that respondent No.5 has lodged abovementioned false FIR regarding her abduction, which is nothing but bundles of lies, as she was never abducted by anyone. I.O further states that he has already filed copy of such statement along with report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of above FIR under ‘C’ class. Learned counsel for the petitioners being satisfied with the statement of I.O do not press this petition. Accordingly, the same stands disposed of along with listed application with directions to officials respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. The Magistrate shall pass order on the summary as recommended disposing of the case in accordance with law.

Accordingly, the same stands disposed of along with listed application with directions to officials respondents to provide protection to the couple in accordance with law, as and when they needed. The Magistrate shall pass order on the summary as recommended disposing of the case in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
